rule_metadata.author: frack113
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Diantz Download and Compress Into a CAB File

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Diantz Download and Compress Into a CAB File
id: 185d7418-f250-42d0-b72e-0c8b70661e93
status: test
description: Download and compress a remote file and store it in a cab file on local
  machine.
references:
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Diantz/
author: frack113
date: 2021-11-26
modified: 2022-08-13
tags:
- attack.command-and-control
- attack.t1105
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - diantz.exe
    - ' \\\\'
    - .cab
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
